project_type: React Vite SPA - Fashion portfolio site (Happiness Fashion World)
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/happy-threads && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run TypeScript compilation check. 2. Run vite build. 3. Verify all pexels IDs return HTTP 200 from CDN.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Pexels website is behind Cloudflare (403 on scrape) but CDN image URLs work fine for HEAD requests to verify IDs.
contribution_requirements: Branch: rebrand/happiness-fashion-world. Replace Pexels image IDs with verified Nigerian/African fashion photos.
key_patterns: pexels(id, width, height) helper in src/utils/images.ts builds CDN URLs. designs array in src/data/designs.ts uses pexels() for images. Hero.tsx and About.tsx also use pexels() directly.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/data/ - static data, src/utils/ - utility functions
